name: Bingocle
tagline: Trade the words before they hit the card.
description: A community bingo prediction market refereed by an AI oracle on Mantle. Predict the words a speaker will say live; an AI Validation Oracle listens, calls the bingo, and settles on-chain. Play entirely by chatting — no terminal, no seed phrase.

activation.email: Email the capability with one instruction per line (same verbs as Telegram).

commands.name: /wallet
commands.summary: Show your embedded demo wallet + balance

commands.name: /submit
commands.summary: Predict up to 3 words; first submitter founds the word

commands.name: /finalize
commands.summary: Organizer: AI-curate the pool + odds and commit on-chain

commands.name: /pool
commands.summary: List curated words, odds, and current phase

commands.name: /card
commands.summary: Mint and view your 5x5 bingo card with live marks

commands.name: /buy
commands.summary: Stake MNT on a word at the running odds

commands.name: /validate
commands.summary: Organizer: run the AI oracle and commit verdicts on-chain

commands.name: /claim
commands.summary: Collect prediction payouts, bingo bonuses, and founder seeds
